Bug Title: Language and Country Flag Mismatch on boarding screen
Description: When the app is opened, the default language is set to Arabic (AR), but the country flag displayed on the landing page is English (ENG).
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Observe the default language
3. Check the country flag shown
Expected Result: The country flag should match the default language (Arabic → Arabic flag, English → English flag).
Actual Result: The app language is Arabic (AR), but the country flag is set to English (ENG).

Bug Title: UI Issues – Button Misalignment, Language Toggle Design Mismatch & Blurry Logo and alingment
Description: On the homepage UI, the “Start Learning”, "Next", "Get Started" button are  positioned too low (pushed downward), and the language toggle design/placement does not match the expected UI design also logo is blur and not aligned
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the homepage.
2. Observe the “Start Learning”, "Next", "Get Started" button position.
3. Check the language toggle (EN dropdown) at the top.
4. observe logo position
Expected Result:
The “Start Learning”, "Next", "Get Started" button should be properly aligned and not pushed too far down.

The language toggle design should match the expected UI design.

The logo should be aligned, clear and sharp (not blurry).
Actual Result:
The "“Start Learning”, "Next", "Get Started" button  is pushed too far down (misaligned).

The language toggle does not match the expected design.

The logo appears blurry and misaligned

Bug Title: Login Page – Invalid Error Message Displayed
Description: On the Login page, an invalid error message is being displayed, which may be unclear, incorrect, or not user-friendly.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the Login page.
2. Enter incorrect or incomplete credentials.
3. Click on the Login button.
4. Observe the error message.
Expected Result: A clear and user-friendly error message should be displayed (e.g., “Invalid email or password”).

Bug Title: Recover Password Page – Invalid Error Message Displayed
Description: On the Recover Password page, unclear error message is displayed when input a invalid email. This affects user understanding and experience.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to ligin page
2. Click Forgot Password 
3. Enter an invalid or empty email.
4. Click on the "Proceed next" button.
5. Observe the error message.
Expected Result: Should show message “Please enter a valid email address” or “Email is required”)
Actual Result: "The reset token field is required & one more error" msg showed which is unclear

Bug Title: Invalid Error Popup Message for Wrong Code Entry
Description: When a user enters an incorrect code, the system shows a generic “Invalid error” popup message, which is unclear and not user-friendly.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to first time login as student in KAF application
2. Enter valid credential and click login 
3. Enter an incorrect otp
4. Click confirm OTP
5. observe the eror message
Expected Result: A clear and specific error message should be displayed (e.g., “Incorrect code. Please try again.”).
Actual Result: “NoSuchMethodError:The methodd'[]'was called on null.” popup message is shown.

Bug Title: Unclear Error Message on Login Without Internet Connection
Description: When a student attempts to log in without internet connection, the system displays error popup message, which does not indicate the actual issue.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Turn off internet connection
2. Open the app
3. Try to log in as a student
4. Observe the error message
Expected Result: A clear and user-friendly message should be shown (e.g., “No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.”).
Actual Result: An unclear error popup message is displayed

Bug Title: Sign Up Button Should Be Hidden for Students
Description: The Sign Up button is currently visible in the app, but students are not allowed to sign up. This creates confusion for users.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Navigate to the login page
3. Observe the Sign Up button
Expected Result: The Sign Up button should be hidden for students since they do not need to sign up.
Actual Result: The Sign Up button is visible, even though student registration is not required.

Description: The search icon is not positioned correctly in the UI. It appears misaligned and does not match the expected design layout.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to login in KAF app
2.  observe the top of homepage
3. Locate the search icon
4. Observe the position of the search icon
Expected Result: The search icon should be properly aligned the search field according to the design
Actual Result: The search icon is misplaced and does not align with the search field properly.

Bug Title: Course Thumbnail Missing in My Courses Page
Description: In the “My Programs” section, course thumbnails are not displayed on the “My Courses” page, making it difficult for users to visually identify courses.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Go to “My Programs”
3. Navigate to the “My Courses” page
4. Observe the course list
Expected Result: Each course should display with the course thumbnail image
Actual Result: Course thumbnails are missing from the “My Courses” page.

Bug Title: Invalid Message Displayed When Clicking on a Course
Description: When a user clicks on any course, the system shows the message: “The course is a part of a subscription”.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Navigate to any course in the course list
3. Click on the course
Expected Result: Should not be displayed any message.
Actual Result: The message “The course is a part of a subscription” is displayed, even when it is not relevant.

Bug Title: Video Section Not Working Properly When Clicking Episode in My Course
Description: When a user clicks on any episode within a course, the video section does not function properly. This affects the learning experience as users are unable to watch the selected content smoothly.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. login as a student
2. Go to “My program”
3. Open any course
4. Click on any episode
5. Observe the video section
Expected Result: The selected episode video should load and play correctly without issues.
Actual Result: The video section does not work properly when an episode is selected.

Description: One course loads and displays content properly, while another course does not load any content at all.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Go to “My Courses”
3. Open a course (Course A) → content loads correctly
4. Open another course (Course B) → no content is loaded
Expected Result: All courses should load and display their content properly.
Actual Result: One courses load correctly, while others do not load any content.

Bug Title: Course Shows 30% Complete Even After Finishing
Description: The course is already completed and the certificate is generated, but it still shows only 30% completion in “My Courses.”
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Complete a course
2. Get the certificate
3. Go to “My Courses

Description: When clicking “Tap here to Download,” a success message is shown, but the certificate file cannot be found in the downloaded files.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to certificate section
2. “Tap here to Download”
3. success message
4. Check downloaded files
Expected Result: Certificate should be downloaded and visible in device storage
Actual Result: Download shows successful, but certificate download failed

Bug Title: Incorrect Filter Options in “All Programs” Section
Description: In the filter section under “All Programs,” the available filter options are incorrect. Instead of showing categories, it displays course price, which does not match the expected functionality.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the app
2. Click on Favourite button
3. Navigate to All Programs
4. Click on Filter
5. Observe the filter options
Expected Result: The filter should display Categories as an option.

Bug Title: Incorrect “Sort By” Options – Course Price Should Not Be Included
Description: The “Sort By” section currently includes an incorrect option (Course Price).
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the app
2. Click on Favourite
3. Navigate to All Programs
4. Click on sort by 
5. Observe the sort by options
Expected Result:
The “Sort By” section should only include:

Relevance (Default)
Popular Courses
Newest Courses
Rating
Actual Result: The “Sort By” section includes Course Price, which should not be present.

Bug Title: Filter & Sort Panel Does Not Close on Outside Click
Description: The Filter and Sort panel opens as a half-screen overlay. When clicking outside the panel (empty space), it should close, but it does not.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. to Filter / Sort By
3. Panel opens in half screen
4. Click on empty space outside the panel
Expected Result: The panel should close when clicking outside
Actual Result: The panel does not close and remains open

Bug Title: Checkout Page and Enroll Button Visible for Guest Users
Description: When a guest user opens the app and clicks on a course, the checkout page is shown. This should not happen, as guest users are not allowed to enroll or proceed to checkout.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the app without logging in
2. Click on any course
3. Observe the course details and checkout flow
Expected Result: Checkout page and “Enroll Now” button should not be visible for guest users
Actual Result: Checkout page is shown and “Enroll Now” button is visible for guest users
